label: P&L by Client
description: Client-level P&L table with org, active strategy count, daily change, and percentage change.

0.6.note: — added Skeleton import and isLoading early-return skeleton showing 5 placeholder client rows.

0.7.note: clientPnL.length === 0 shows 'No clients match current filters'.

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [pnl]. 0.4 ✓ No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ No direct lib/mocks imports. 0.6 FIXED — added Skeleton import and isLoading early-return skeleton showing 5 placeholder client rows. 0.7 ✓ clientPnL.length === 0 shows 'No clients match current filters'. 0.8 ✓ Error handled at PnLDataProvider level. 0.9 ✓ No dead code.

1.3.note: selectedOrgIds synced from globalScope; generateClientPnL filters by selectedOrgIds.

1.4.note: selectedClientIds derived from globalScope.clientIds via getClientIdsForOrgs(); passed to generateClientPnL.

1.5.note: selectedStrategyIds used in pnlComponents (strategies filter from context).

1.6.note: Empty org/client arrays → generateClientPnL returns unfiltered rows.

1.7.note: No reference data in lib/mocks from this widget.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ clientPnL from usePnLData() hook only. 1.2 ✓ Context reads useGlobalScope(). 1.3 ✓ selectedOrgIds synced from globalScope; generateClientPnL filters by selectedOrgIds. 1.4 ✓ selectedClientIds derived from globalScope.clientIds via getClientIdsForOrgs(); passed to generateClientPnL. 1.5 ✓ selectedStrategyIds used in pnlComponents (strategies filter from context). 1.6 ✓ Empty org/client arrays → generateClientPnL returns unfiltered rows. 1.7 ✓ No reference data in lib/mocks from this widget.

findings: L0 — 0.6 FAILED (no isLoading handling). Fixed: added Skeleton import and isLoading early-return guard rendering 5 skeleton client rows matching the real row shape. 8 of 9 checks already passed.
